reason: Successfully tested GitHub username retrieval through agent tool usage with proper account permission flow and response verification.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home with sidebar containing multiple agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260513-025519-cqa3" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully, showing agent status as "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status displayed as "idle", which satisfies the requirement.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into message input field - Message appeared in input field and send button became enabled.
Clicked send button to submit message - Message was submitted successfully and a new session "GitHub Identity Verification Request" was created with agent status changing to "working".
Waited for response and account request card appeared - Card requested GitHub account access with reason "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated user's username?"
Selected and clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account permission - Permission was granted and agent continued processing (status changed to "working").
Waited for API permission request - Agent requested permission for GitHub API endpoint "GET /user" to fetch authenticated user information.
Clicked "Always allow read:user" button to grant API scope - Permission scope was confirmed for reading user profile data.
Received and verified final response - Agent successfully returned the GitHub username "yiw190" in the response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing the complete successful response with username clearly visible.
